channel.title: BGMI on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in BGMI on Tech Tracker

item.title: Vi Network best and fastest APN settings with BGMI ping issue fix.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-6KU6Y2ISJps/YT4ge-jOKeI/AAAAAAAAGoc/-y9Ck1IeTmIjNselwkYlY-5ryVpgphejQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1631461488035344-0.png" alt=""> If you are experiencing slow speed on your Vi Network then most probably there could be many reasons behind it but generally all the mobile networks provide poor and very slow APN settings which is the main issue for slow speed and network related issues so if you want to fix your internet speed or any other problems related to your mobile network first you need to configure APN : access point names and set working and best access point names that can easily fix all your network issues in one go.
